title: tephrosia lithosperma
intro: Tephrosia lithosperma, also known as Horsefly Tree or Lithospermum, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia lithosperma include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its rich content of flavonoids and alkaloids. Tephrosia lithosperma is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
